caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I DON NEVER DO SHIT" and a green baseball cap with headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and grey sweatpants to his right. Clothing racks are visible in the background. On-screen text includes the name "CALAMAR WHITE" and a small red and white logo that reads "Silly Fox." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking into the microphone. He begins with a neutral expression, looks down slightly in the subsequent moments, and finally looks toward the camera with a slight smile while continuing to speak.
